case_title: KHORGE, JIM vs. LOPEZ, ALICIA et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALICIA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALICIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALICIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3138 24TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $557.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $557.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1999, LEASE FORFEITED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHORGE, JIM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-25-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-01-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHORGE, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALICIA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ALICIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR BLOOM, DONALD EDWARD AS ATTORNEY FOR KHORGE, JIM

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM # 503B. DAVID MCCARVILLE, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. MARIA TORREANO, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT; JIM KHORGE, PLAINTIFF (IN PRO PER) AND DEFENDANT (IN PRO PER) ALICIA LOPEZ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, JIM KHORGE AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ALICIA LOPEZ FOR THE RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 3138 24TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED AND WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, HOWEVER ACTUAL PHYSICAL EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED THROUGH 12:00 NOON ON 2/15/99. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE 2/15/99 THE SUM OF $557.00 REPRESENTING $667.00 PAST DUE RENT LESS $110.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT WHICH WILL BE HELD BY THE PLAINTIFF FOR A NET TOTAL DUE OF $557.00.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1999, OFF CALENDAR AMENDED CMPLT FILED ON 12/23/98.
